title: Wild Iron
description: Adds a wild west themed pistol item for early and late game.
body: ![Wild Iron Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63c78eae92c40c98a06a55c1aeccd73bbb12abed.png) # Wild Iron ### Available for 1.20.1 Forge and NeoForge. No dependencies required. ## Description Wild Iron adds a fun wild-west themed pistol weapon. It can be crafted, found in mineshafts, or obtained from a weaponsmith villager. They come with 4 bullet types: Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite. Also included in the mod is a wearable cowboy hat item, "Honcho's Hat". While wearing, it increases the accuracy of the Wild Iron to 100%. It can be found commonly in mineshafts or obtained from master leatherworkers villagers. ![showcase](https://i.imgur.com/p2yideW.gif) ![All added items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b647f35d93fe1fe6e3607beae005e12b46175b3.png) ## Trims You can apply armor trims to the Wild Iron in a smithing table. The current trim is visible on the Wild Iron's item model unlike armor. ![screenshot of trimmed wild irons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3342a8c2b8f1f1dec58b2fa4826740c2f8594fa9.png) ----- Feel free to report any bugs on the github issue page. **Can I use this mod in a modpack?** - Sure, go ahead! Enjoy Wild Iron!
